title: Family Group Chat
drDigitalIntro:
Time to put your messaging skills to the test!
• You'll send messages, share a photo, react to a message, and handle a video call.
• No hand-holding this time — you've got this!

playgroundTask.goal: You handled messages, photos, reactions, and a video call

steps.say: Open Alex's conversation and send them a message: 'See you Saturday!'
Type 'See you Saturday!' and send it.
Switch to Grandma's conversation and send her a photo.
Send Grandma a photo using the + button.
Switch to Jordan's conversation to video call them.
Start a video call with Jordan.
Mute your microphone — there's background noise.
Turn off your camera for a moment.

drDigitalSuccess: You aced it! You sent messages, shared a photo, reacted with an emoji, and managed a full video call with all the controls.
drDigitalHint: Select contacts from the sidebar, use the + button for photos, double-click messages to react, and use the call controls at the bottom.
